calendar.matters:
Will Contest And Petn. To Revoke Probate Of Purported Will
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der (Counsel for Deborah Dolch, Successor Trustee); Barbara Jagiello (Counsel for Susan Collins); Maria Lawless (Counsel for William Collins).

Counsel reported that a settlement had been reached by and among the parties, with the exception of whose broker should be retained to commence the sale of the real property. After discussion, the Court indicated its preference that the broker be selected at the discretion of the Successor Trustee and authorized proceeding by ex parte application with respect to that issue.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.

Petn. To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property, For Order Determining Said Assets Are Held In Constructive Trust And Directing Successor Trustees To Transfer Property To Estate Of William J. Collins
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Off Calendar

Will Contest And Petn. To Revoke Probate Of Purported Will
Off Calendar Dec-04-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 288915. Lee Sagatelyan appearing for William J. Collins. Barbara Jagiello appearing for Susan Gee Collins. Ernest Der appearing for Debra Dolch, successor trustee. Case is on appeal. Parties have agreed to mediate this matter. Mediation is set in December. Matter is continued to 1/10/07 for status. Mr. Der will file an amendment to the accounting. All matters are continued to 1/10/07. Judge: Raymond J. Arata. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petn. To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property, For Order Determining Said Assets Are Held In Constructive Trust And Directing Successor Trustees To Transfer Property To Estate Of William J. Collins
Off Calendar Dec-04-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Determination
Off Calendar Sep-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 288915. Levon Sagatelyan appearing for William Collins. Elvira Orly appearing for Barbara Jagiello for the wife. After listening to oral argument, Court rules on Susan Gee Collins' proposed contest and grounds of objection to probate of purported 2005 Will would not violate the no-contest provision of the 2003 Will. Her proposed contest and grounds of objection to probate of purported 2005 Will would violate the no-contest provision of the Restatement of the 1988 Trust and its three amendments. On William Collins, Jr.'s proposed petition to determine validity of the Restatement of Trust would not violate the no-contest clauses contained in the Third Amendment to the William J. Collins 1988 Trust. Each counsel to prepare their order. Court is admitting the 3/1/2005 Will today and appointing William J. Collins, Jr. as the executor with full authority and no bond. Order signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Susan Lee. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
